abstract: The promotional offer signature you generate using an earlier signature version.
overview:
## Discussion

To provide a promotional-offer retention message, you need to cryptographically sign the offer and include it in the [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOffer] parameter of your [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/RealtimeResponseBody] response.

For instructions on generating the `encodedSignature` for the `promotionalOfferSignatureV1`, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/generating-a-signature-for-promotional-offers].

# promotionalOfferSignatureV1

**Object**

The promotional offer signature you generate using an earlier signature version.

## Declaration

```swift
object promotionalOfferSignatureV1
```

## Discussion

To provide a promotional-offer retention message, you need to cryptographically sign the offer and include it in the [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/promotionalOffer] parameter of your [doc://com.apple.retentionmessaging/documentation/RetentionMessaging/RealtimeResponseBody] response.



For instructions on generating the `encodedSignature` for the `promotionalOfferSignatureV1`, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/generating-a-signature-for-promotional-offers].
title: promotionalOfferSignatureV1
